message:
🌱 Add headlamp: external auth (exec) not working (azure/kubelogin and mission (#801)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "headlamp-1885-external-auth-exec-not-working-azure-kubelogin-and-aws-iam-authent",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "headlamp: external auth (exec) not working (azure/kubelogin and aws-iam-authenticator)",
+    "description": "external auth (exec) not working (azure/kubelogin and aws-iam-authenticator). Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current headlamp deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your headlamp version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp\nhelm list -n headlamp 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working headlamp installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review headlamp configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant headlamp configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp\nkubectl get configmap -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=headlamp\n```\nI tried connecting to our prod clusters using \"azure/kubelogin\" and aws-iam-authenticator.\n\nNone of these Auth Methods worked."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for external auth (exec) not working (azure/kubelogin and…",
+        "description": "On at least MacOS, GUI apps do not take on the shell PATH.\nHowever they are needed for kubectl auth plugins, and perhaps other binaries like minikube\r\n\n### How to test\n\n- How to test: \n    - change main.ts `pathInfoDebug = true` \n    - make app-macos\n    - Run the macos app from the Finder (do not\n```yaml\nexec:\n    apiVersion: ...\n    command: ...\n    args: ...\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp\nkubectl get events -n headlamp --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"external auth (exec) not working (azure/kubelogin and…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "On at least MacOS, GUI apps do not take on the shell PATH.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "exec:\n    apiVersion: ...\n    command: ...\n    args: ...",
+        "- name: rancher\n  user:\n    exec:\n      apiVersion: client.authentication.k8s.io/v1beta1\n      args:\n      - keychain\n      - user@cluster\n      command: kubectl-passman\n      env: null\n      interactiveMode: IfAvailable\n      provideClusterInfo: false",
+        "$ sudo launchctl config user path /bin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/usr/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/opt/homebrew/bin"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "headlamp",
+      "sandbox",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "headlamp"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/headlamp/issues/1885",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/headlamp",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/headlamp/pull/1908"
+    },
+    "reactions": 13,
+    "comments": 29,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with headlamp installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:34:33.538Z",

+  }
+}
